message:
fix(zig): Update ArrayList API for Zig 0.15.2 compatibility

In Zig 0.15.2, the ArrayList API changed:
- Removed: ArrayList.init(allocator)
- New: ArrayList{} with allocator passed to all methods

Changes:
- Replace .init(allocator) with {} for initialization
- Pass allocator to deinit(), append(), and toOwnedSlice()

Fixes test262 runner compilation error.
